hero.title: Find nearby health centers and book diagnostic tests.
hero.subtitle: Access professional diagnostic services at affordable prices across rural health centers in Sri Lanka.
home.browseByCategory.subtitle: Explore all available diagnostic test categories.
home.howItWorks.subtitle: Get your diagnostic tests done in three simple steps.
home.howItWorks.step1.title: Find a Health Center
home.howItWorks.step1.body: Browse nearby labs or search by name and location.
home.howItWorks.step2.title: Choose Your Test
home.howItWorks.step2.body: View available tests, prices, and preparation instructions.
home.howItWorks.step3.title: Book & Visit
home.howItWorks.step3.body: Book your test online and visit the lab at your convenience.
home.featured.title: Featured Health Centers
home.featured.subtitle: Top-rated diagnostic centers near you.
home.popular.title: Popular Diagnostic Tests
home.popular.subtitle: Most frequently booked tests by our members.
login.subtitle: Sign in to your patient account
register.title: Patient Portal
register.termsText: By clicking register, you agree to MediLab's patient terms of service and privacy policy.

healthProfile.title: Health Profile
healthProfile.subtitle: Manage your personal and medical information
healthProfile.form.householdHelp: Use your family's unique Household ID to link records.
healthReports.title: User Health Reports
healthReports.subtitle: Access and manage your medical laboratory reports, imaging results, and health summaries in one secure location.
healthReports.empty.title: No Reports Found Yet
healthReports.empty.body: Your health reports will appear here once they are processed by the lab. You can view, download, and share them with your doctors.
